title: Free Legal Representation. In cases of violations of R.A. No. 11641, R.A.
content: 37 No. 12021, or their respective IRRs, violations of these Rules, or breach of contract and 38 the seafarer cannot afford the services of a counsel, seafarers shall have the right to free 39 legal assistance and protection and to the fair and speedy disposition of cases, including 40 the expeditious settlement of money claims, subject to applicable laws, rules and 41 regulations. The DMW shall provide legal assistance in accordance with the guidelines 42 provided for the use of the Agarang Kalinga at Saklolo para sa mga OFW na 43 Nangangailangan (AKSYON) Fund. 44 45 For seafarers with cases before the Department, the Department shall advise the seafarer 46 that he or she may secure the services of counsel and if he or she so chooses, refer him 47 or her to the Public Attorney’s Office (PAO) who shall render, free of charge, legal 48 representation, assistance, and counseling to seafarers. In the event that the seafarer 49 does not avail of the services of counsel, the Overseas Employment Adjudicator shall 50 endeavor to protect the seafarer’s rights. 51 52 For seafarers who have cases abroad, the shipowner and/or concerned LMA shall have 53 the primary obligation to inform the DMW of the nature of the case to enable it to provide 54 legal assistance in accordance with the guidelines provided for the use of the AKSYON 55 Fund. 56 57
